strings.settings.title: Mau Fa'atupu
strings.settings.subtitle: Mau Hinaaro o te Porokirama
strings.lang.title: Reo
strings.lang.intro: Ua fa'aineine'hia mau reo nui. E tāmau i to oe reo no te fa'auraraa atoa e reira 'ore i here ia internet — mau fa'aauhia, mau tāroa tūhaa e ērā a'e.
strings.lang.failed: Ua ravea faahia te tāmau. Fa'ahiti i to oe ferito'a, e tāmau'hia i muri.
strings.settings.night.desc: Te ura hōhonu e fa'atia ia i mau mata ua rave i te pō — e iti roa te ura i ni'a i te ite pō.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: E ura autōmatika i muri a'e i te to'o o te rā ia pō te ra'i.
strings.settings.location.desc: Te vāhi e fa'aapo'o'hia ai te ra'i.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Tiriri ia fa'atia'hia i ni'a i te fa'aite.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Parau noa atura te fa'aite e mau fa'aoto — no te fa'aapo'o 'ore rima e mau tamāroa e 'ore e ite.
strings.settings.fov: Te Fare Ite o te Kamera
strings.settings.fov.desc: Fa'atupu fa'aitiiti ia no te fa'aite tūtū i mau rāira fa'aite feti'a e mau ara satellite i te ra'i mau.
strings.settings.about.credits: Ua hāmani'hia me te astronomy-engine, satellite.js & Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Fa'atia i te Ra'i Atoa
strings.paywall.subtitle: E fa'atau ho'e manihini. 'Aita e fa'atau i te mahana, 'aita e pūrotiraa — nō oe i te hora atoa, atoa e 'ore internet.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Mau feti'a, fa'aite e satellite atoa
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Misini Taime — ite i te ra'i i tēhea mahana
strings.paywall.feature.events: Mau tūhaa ra'i — eclipse, ua feti'a, fa'ata'a
strings.paywall.comingSoon: E fa'atia'hia mau fa'atau i te taime tata'i — fa'aapo'o i tēia code fa'atia i teie nei.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Tīpenu i tō fa'aite no te himi i te ra'i
strings.stars.title: Mau Feti'a
strings.stars.subtitle: Mau feti'a i hi'ohia {n} māramarama roa
strings.deepsky.title: Te Ra'i Hōhonu
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Feti'a {n}, nebula, galaxie e mau kōpua
strings.constellations.title: Mau Fa'aite Feti'a
strings.constellations.subtitle: {n} mau tāta'o feti'a i hi'ohia
strings.satellites.title: Mau Satellite
strings.events.title: Mau Tūhaa Ra'i
strings.events.subtitle: Te mea e roto mai — Fa'ao'o no te taime 'āfaro
strings.events.calculating: E fa'aapo'o ra i mau tūhaa e roto mai…
strings.search.name: Himi i te iho'a…
strings.list.gettingLocation: E himi ra i tō vāhi…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: 'Aita e mea fana — Fa'atia i tā mea, 'oia'i'o fa'ao'o ★ no te tāpe'a.
strings.list.empty.visible: 'Aita e mea i ni'a i te horizon teie nei — Tāmau "Fa'aite atoa".
strings.list.empty.search: 'Aita e mea i fā i tō himiaa.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: 'Aita e mau feti'a i roto i te rāpae i ni'a i te horizon teie nei.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: 'Aita e mau mea ra'i hōhonu i ni'a i te horizon teie nei.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: 'Aita tō fa'aite feti'a i ni'a i te horizon teie nei.
strings.sat.overhead: ● Ite'hia teie nei — Ite i ni'a!
strings.sat.overheadDay: E i ni'a teie nei e māramarama ra
strings.sat.overheadShadow: E i ni'a teie nei e i te otapi o te Fenua
strings.sat.noPass: 'Aita e ta'ata'a e ite'hia i teie nei
strings.sat.loading: E fa'aho'i ra i te fa'aite orbit…
strings.fav.empty:
'Aita e mea fana.
Fa'atia i tō fenua'ura e feti'a, fa'ao'o ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: 'Aita ō mau mea fana i ni'a i te horizon teie nei.
strings.fav.noMatch: 'Aita e mea fana e fā i tō himiaa.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} i raro i te horizon — Fa'aite i raro i te Fenua.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} 'aita i ni'a teie nei — Fa'ao'o fa'aite no te ta'ata'a e tata'i mai.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ 'Āfaro Taime: {when} — Fa'ao'o no te ho'i mai
strings.point.turnRight: Huri i ni'a i te tōpata'i
strings.point.turnLeft: Huri i ni'a i te tō'aro'a
strings.point.permBody: E fa'aite ana'e Planet Pointer i tō fa'aoto i ni'a i te vitio kamera mau no te fa'aite ia {name}.
strings.info.favorited: ★  I roto i mau mea fana
strings.info.passNote: Taime Fēnua. Māuruuru rahi = māramarama, fa'ata'a'ita.
strings.ev.lunarSub: E u'i ana te Avaeva i roto i te otapi o te Fenua
strings.ev.solarSub: E u'i ana te Avaeva i ni'a i te Rā
strings.time.title: Misini Taime
strings.time.subtitle: Ite i te ra'i i tēhea mahana e taime.
